_comment: Per-1M-token rates (per-1M-character for DeepL). MUST be re-verified against each vendor's current pricing page before trusting any cost figure in results.md — pricing changes often and nothing here is auto-synced. Use null for any rate you haven't personally verified: the report will show 'rate not set' instead of a misleading $0.00.

gemini-2.5-pro._verified: ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing, checked 2026-07-17. This is the <=200k-token-prompt tier; prompts over 200k tokens bill at 2.50 / 15.00 / 0.25 instead, which this file does not model.

deepseek-v4-flash._verified: api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing, checked 2026-07-17. inputPer1M is the cache-miss rate; cachedInputPer1M is the cache-hit rate.

deepseek-v4-pro._verified: api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing, checked 2026-07-17. inputPer1M is the cache-miss rate; cachedInputPer1M is the cache-hit rate.

qwen-plus._note: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio pricing is region-specific — check your console's pricing page.

qwen-max._note: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio pricing is region-specific — check your console's pricing page.

azure-openai._note: No single universal rate — depends on your specific Azure deployment/region/tier. Fill in from your own Azure pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

deepl._note: deepl.com/pro-api's API rate table did not render via automated fetch (likely client-side rendered) — fill in the current per-character rate manually before trusting DeepL cost figures.

gpt-5-mini._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

gpt-5-nano._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

gpt-5-chat._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

gpt-5.1._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

gpt-4.1._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

gpt-4.1-nano._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page, not a generic OpenAI rate card.

o3._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — verify against your Foundry resource's cost/pricing page. Also a reasoning model: confirm it accepts this script's request shape (system role + temperature) before trusting any results, not just the rate.

Kimi-K2.6._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — model/version naming not independently verified; confirm it exists in your catalog before trusting a rate or a result.

Kimi-K2.5._note: Azure AI Foundry deployment pricing — model/version naming not independently verified; confirm it exists in your catalog before trusting a rate or a result.

DeepSeek-V4-Flash._note: This is the Foundry-hosted deployment, keyed by its exact deployment name — do NOT copy the rate from the lowercase 'deepseek-v4-flash' entry above, which is DeepSeek's own direct API price. Azure-hosted pricing for the same model is not guaranteed to match.

DeepSeek-V4-Pro._note: This is the Foundry-hosted deployment, keyed by its exact deployment name — do NOT copy the rate from the lowercase 'deepseek-v4-pro' entry above, which is DeepSeek's own direct API price. Azure-hosted pricing for the same model is not guaranteed to match.
